evals.name: simple-feat-add-files
evals.prompt: Generate a commit message for the staged changes. New authentication files have been added: backend/src/routes/auth.py and backend/src/app.py were modified to integrate authentication.
expectations: Commit type must be 'feat' for new features
Scope should be 'auth' for authentication changes
Subject should use imperative mood (e.g., 'add' not 'added')
Independent mode should NOT have enhanced markers

evals.name: conventional-commits-compliance
evals.prompt: Generate a commit message. Added new feature for exporting reports to PDF format. Files: src/services/report_exporter.py, src/templates/pdf_template.html.
expectations: Must have space after colon before subject
